case_title: BIMAL CHAND VS. EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAND, BIMAL AS TO DEFENDANT EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT GRINSELL, RAYMOND ZANGHI, JOHN P. NOVAK, EDWARD ARSHAWSKY, ZANGHI TORRES SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON APR-09-2014 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF BIMAL CHAND'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO THE APPLICANT'S ADDRESS ON THE REQUEST AND THE ADDRESS IN IJS. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: EBURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
